sarma_description: Delicate grape leaves hand-rolled around a savory filling of rice, herbs, and spices. A classic Turkish meze.
falafel_description: Crispy deep-fried patties of spiced ground chickpeas and fava beans, served with a tahini dip.
adana_kebab_description: Spicy minced lamb kebab, grilled on a wide skewer, served with bulgur pilaf and grilled vegetables.
iskender_kebab_special_description: Succulent döner kebab slices served over pita bread, generously topped with a rich tomato sauce, yogurt, and sizzling melted butter. A true Turkish delight!
home_page_title: RUMI Restaurant - Authentic Turkish Cuisine in Geneva, Switzerland
home_page_description: Experience the rich flavors of Turkey at RUMI Restaurant in Geneva. We offer a wide range of authentic dishes, from kebabs to mezes, in a warm and welcoming atmosphere. Halal options available.
home_hero_subtitle: Your Culinary Journey to Turkey Begins Here in Geneva
home_story_content: RUMI Restaurant brings the heart of Turkish culinary traditions to Geneva. Our passion is to share the rich tapestry of flavors, aromas, and hospitality that Turkish cuisine is renowned for. Each dish is crafted with the freshest ingredients and a deep respect for authentic recipes passed down through generations. Join us for a memorable dining experience.

menu_page_title: RUMI Restaurant Menu - Starters, Main Courses, Desserts | Geneva
menu_page_description: Explore the delicious and authentic Turkish menu at RUMI Restaurant in Geneva. From savory kebabs to delightful mezes and traditional desserts. Halal options available.

privacy_policy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_policy.intro_text: Welcome to RUMI Restaurant ("we," "our," or "us"). We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. If you have any questions or concerns about our policy, or our practices with regards to your personal information, please contact us.
privacy_policy.info_collect_text: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when registering at the Services expressing an interest in obtaining information about us or our products and services, when participating in activities on the Services or otherwise contacting us.
privacy_policy.how_use_text: We use personal information collected via our Services for a variety of business purposes described below. We process your personal information for these purposes in reliance on our legitimate business interests, in order to enter into or perform a contract with you, with your consent, and/or for compliance with our legal obligations.
privacy_policy.how_use_list_1: To facilitate account creation and logon process.
privacy_policy.how_use_list_2: To send you marketing and promotional communications.
privacy_policy.how_use_list_3: To fulfill and manage your orders.
privacy_policy.contact_text: If you have questions or comments about this policy, you may email us or contact us by post at:

terms_of_usage.title: Terms of Usage
terms_of_usage.agreement_text: These Terms of Usage constitute a legally binding agreement made between you, whether personally or on behalf of an entity ("you") and RUMI Restaurant ("we," "us" or "our"), concerning your access to and use of our website and mobile application.
terms_of_usage.ip_rights_text: Unless otherwise indicated, the Site and App are our proprietary property and all source code, databases, functionality, software, website designs, audio, video, text, photographs, and graphics on the Site (collectively, the "Content") and the trademarks, service marks, and logos contained therein (the "Marks") are owned or controlled by us or licensed to us, and are protected by copyright and trademark laws.
terms_of_usage.user_reps_text: By using the Site, you represent and warrant that:
terms_of_usage.user_reps_list_1: All registration information you submit will be true, accurate, current, and complete.
terms_of_usage.user_reps_list_2: You will maintain the accuracy of such information and promptly update such registration information as necessary.
terms_of_usage.user_reps_list_3: You have the legal capacity and you agree to comply with these Terms of Usage.
terms_of_usage.user_reps_list_4: You are not a minor in the jurisdiction in which you reside.
terms_of_usage.contact_text: In order to resolve a complaint regarding the Site or to receive further information regarding use of the Site, please contact us at:
